mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UB_MEMBER( member_number, member_id, member_pw, member_name, member_nickname, member_phone, member_gender, survey_number, member_type, member_state, survey_write, file_number ) VALUES ( seq_user.nextval, #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberNickname}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberGender}, null, 'NODECIDED', '계정 활성화', 'N', null )
mapper.select: SELECT count(member_number) FROM tbl_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT * FROM UB_MEMBER WHERE member_id = #{memberId} and member_pw = #{memberPw}
SELECT member_id FROM tbl_member WHERE member_number = #{memberNumber}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UB_MATCHING WHERE (mentor_number = #{memberNumber} OR mentee_number = #{memberNumber}) AND matching_state = '매칭중'
SELECT MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_NICKNAME, MEMBER_GENDER, MEMBER_PHONE FROM UB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_NUMBER = #{memberNumber}
